Heroic Path-Channeler — Male Erenlander Human Sorcerer: 16
Strength: 16 (+3) Dexterity: 18 (+4) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 11 (+0) Wisdom: 11 (+0) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Background: Deserter Heroic Path: Channeler Alignment: Lawful Good
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 1; Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 212243/225000 Level: 16 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 240/480
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Human Ability Adjustment: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Masterful Focus: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Charisma, Intelligence, Wisdom)
The Eye Opens: +1 Wisdom
Ability Boosts: 5 to distribute
Dragon Wings: Can use a bonus action to gain a 30' fly Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +5
Feat Count: General: 5; Heroic: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Sorcerer (Dragon Ancestor): 1; Sorcerer (Metamagic): 3; Sorcerer (Sorcerous Origin): 1
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Channeled Magic; Masterful Focus; Mind Within The Weave; The Channeling; The Eye Opens Erenlander Human Features: Erenlander Skills; Human Ability Adjustment; Human Feat Bonus; Human Skills Sorcerer Features: Black Dragon; Distant Spell; Draconic Bloodline; Draconic Resilience; Dragon Ancestor; Dragon Wings; Elemental Affinity; Empowered Spell; Font Of Magic; Heightened Spell; Metamagic; Save Proficiency (Constitution; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion); Sorcerous Origin; Spellcasting; Weapon Proficiency (Dagger; Dart; Sling; Quarterstaff; Light Crossbow) Deserter Features: Old Veteran; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Perception); Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Martial)
Feature Notes:
Dragon Ancestor: 1 selection
Human Feat Bonus: +1 general feat
Metamagic: 3 selections
Sorcerous Origin: 1 selection
Old Veteran: Knows how to infiltrate military organizations
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +4 Insight: (wis) +0 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) +0 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +1
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) +5 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +8 Medicine: (wis) +0 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +9
Deception: (cha) +6 Nature: (int) +0 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +0 Perception: (wis) +5 Survival: (wis) +0
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; Athletics; Deception; Investigation; Perception; Religion; Sleight Of Hand
Tool Proficiency: Carpenter's Tools; Land Vehicles
Languages: Draconic; Erenlander; Trader's Tongue
Skill Notes:
Draconic Bloodline: Language (Draconic)
Erenlander Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from any)/Tool Proficiency (Land Vehicles; Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools)
Human Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)/Language (Erenlander; Choose 1 from any)
Draconic Bloodline: +5 on proficient Charisma checks with dragons
Combat
Hit Points: 66 Initiative: +4 Armor Class: 17
Weapon Proficiency: Battleaxe; Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Quarterstaff; Sling
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Battleaxe (+8 1d8+3 S [2h d10]); Dart (+9 1d4+4 P R20/60); Quarterstaff (+8 1d6+3 B [2h d8]); Unarmed Strike (+8 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +4
Draconic Resilience: +16 Hit Points/+3 Armor Class in no armor
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution
Save: Charisma: +6; Constitution: +5; Dexterity: +4; Intelligence: +0; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +0
Save Notes: Masterful Focus: +5 Constitution to maintain spell concentration
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: S0: 6; S: 14 Spell Slots: S1: 4; S2: 3; S3: 3; S4: 3; S5: 2; S6: 3; S7: 1; S8: 1 Attack: S: +6; The Eye Opens: +5 Spell DC: S: 14; The Eye Opens: 13
Spells: True Seeing (The Eye Opens6 [The Eye Opens] Divi): Touched gains 120' Truesight, sees magically concealed doors, and can see into the Ethereal Plane for 1 hr
Magic Notes:
Channeled Magic: +2 S6 spell slots
Channeled Magic: Regains 2 S6 spell slots after a short rest
Distant Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to double the range of a spell or to give a touch spell a 30' range
Elemental Affinity: Spells that deal acid damage inflict +1 HP; can spend 1 sorcery point when casting one to gain resistance to acid for 1 hr
Empowered Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll 1 spell damage die; can be used in addition to another Metamagic option
Font Of Magic: Can use 16 sorcery points per long rest and can use a bonus action to convert between sorcery points and spell slots
Heightened Spell: Can spend 3 sorcery points to inflict disadvantage on a target's initial save vs. a self spell
Mind Within The Weave: Can maintain concentration on two spells simultaneously
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the sorcerer spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
The Channeling: Can expend a level 1 spell slot to change a spell's damage type, a level 2 spell slot to reroll 1s and 2s on a spell's damage dice, or a level 3 spell slot to give 3 spell targets disadvantage on their initial saves vs. a self spell
The Eye Opens: Can cast self True Seeing without expending a spell slot 3 times per long rest
